scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/shared run build && npm --prefix packages/tools run build && npm --prefix packages/server run build && npm --prefix packages/cli run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix packages/shared run lint && npm --prefix packages/tools run lint && npm --prefix packages/server run lint && npm --prefix packages/cli run lint
scripts.test: npm run build && npm --prefix packages/shared test && npm --prefix packages/tools test && npm --prefix packages/server test && npm --prefix packages/cli test && npm run test:encoding
scripts.clean: npm --prefix packages/shared run clean && npm --prefix packages/tools run clean && npm --prefix packages/server run clean && npm --prefix packages/cli run clean && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node_modules',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.fix-links: node -e "var fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');var p=path.resolve('node_modules/@ai-cli');if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('OK - no links to fix');process.exit(0)}var b=false;fs.readdirSync(p).forEach(function(d){var t=path.join(p,d);try{fs.accessSync(path.join(t,'package.json'))}catch(e){console.log('Broken: @ai-cli/'+d);fs.rmSync(t,{recursive:true,force:true});b=true}});if(b){console.log('Fixing links...');require('child_process').execSync('npm install --no-fund --no-audit --install-strategy=nested',{stdio:'inherit',cwd:__dirname})}else{console.log('All workspace links are OK')}"
scripts.rebuild: npm run fix-links && npm run build
